questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = 'a0598894-cacd-4f5d-b911-e033bd87f985' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = 'c3ba5c4a-0c5e-4287-a81b-d6b8784d530c'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = 'a0598894-cacd-4f5d-b911-e033bd87f985'; delete from question_items where id = 'a0598894-cacd-4f5d-b911-e033bd87f985';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
